title: Junior Instructional Designer at iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Instructional Designer in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd:
iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd!
